notes: Discharges T-II-4-001 (Differentials abbrev + d_* API) and T-II-4-004 (IsSeparable iff omegaPullbackCoeff ≠ 0, Silverman II.4.2(c)) fully unconditionally — no sorry, no maxHeartbeats. The IsogenyAlgebraSource type-synonym pattern is the key engineering device, breaking OreLocalization vs alpha.toAlgebra defeq ambiguity so that IsAlgebraic fires via trdeg additivity. Several intermediate scaffold theorems (isogeny_finiteDimensional_of_isAlgebraic_essFiniteType, isogeny_isAlgebraic_of_finite_intermediate, isSeparable_iff_*_of_witnesses, isogeny_degree_pos) appear unused within the file — they are likely staged stepping-stones or intended for external consumers.
